title: Cluster Report Categorization - Cofense Triage v3
content:
Cluster Report Categorization playbook is used to retrieve the reports of specific clusters and perform the categorization of reports.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cofense pack (CofenseTriage, partner-supported).

Use cases: Phishing.

Inputs — Tags: Specify the tags to retrieve the cluster.; MatchPriority: Specify the priority to retrieve the cluster based on the priority of the rules that match the reports in the cluster..

Integrations/scripts used: cofense-cluster-list, cofense-report-list.

                    right:

                      iscontext: true
                    right:
